title: Login button not responding on mobile app
description: After entering email and password, the login button just spins forever. Tried on two different Android phones. iOS version works fine. Cleared cache and reinstalled – same issue.

title: Payment received but subscription not activated
description: Made payment of ৳2,499 via bKash on March 15 but account is still showing as free plan. Transaction ID: BK20260315X7842. Need urgent activation as we have client demo tomorrow.

title: Cannot export report as PDF – blank page
description: When I click Export → PDF, it downloads but the file is completely blank (0 KB useful content). Excel export works. Using Chrome latest version.

title: Feature request: Bulk delete old notifications
description: There are now >300 unread notifications and no way to clear them all at once. Would be very helpful to have 'select all' + delete or 'clear all before date' option.

title: Dashboard charts not loading – endless spinner
description: All analytics widgets show loading spinner forever since yesterday evening. Other pages (settings, tickets, users) load normally. Tried incognito mode and different network.

title: Wrong amount shown after currency change
description: Changed billing currency from USD to BDT but prices are still showing in dollars (with wrong conversion rate). Invoice PDF also shows USD.

title: Team member invited but never received email
description: Invited colleague (milon@company.com) two days ago as admin. He never got the invitation email (checked spam too). Resent twice – same result.

title: App very slow when uploading large images
description: Uploading product images > 3MB takes 40–60 seconds and sometimes fails. Internet speed is 45 Mbps down / 18 Mbps up. Smaller files upload instantly.

title: API returning 500 error on /v2/reports endpoint
description: Since ~4 hours ago, POST /v2/reports gives Internal Server Error 500. GET requests to same endpoint work. No changes in our code. Request ID in logs: req_8f3k9p2m

title: Dark mode toggle not saving preference
description: When I switch to dark mode and refresh or log out/in, it always reverts to light mode. Preference is saved correctly in localStorage though.

title: Cannot add new custom field to ticket form
description: Trying to create new custom field (type: dropdown) but after filling all details and clicking Save, nothing happens – no error message either.

title: Request permanent account deletion
description: No longer need the account under test.user.2024@gmail.com. Please permanently delete all personal data in accordance with DPA & GDPR.
